licenseMenu.name: License
licenseMenu.label: Manage License
licenseMenu.hint: View your subscription tier and free installation slots.

visualTheme.name: Visual theme
visualTheme.hint: Overall look of the VN interface. "Darkest Dungeon" applies a gothic dark-fantasy skin (iron panels, blood-red accents, torch-lit speaker glow) without changing any functionality.

ddAssetsPath.name: Darkest Dungeon theme — assets folder (optional)
ddAssetsPath.hint: Optional folder with your own assets for the theme: title-font.ttf, body-font.ttf and panel-texture.png. If you own the game you may extract assets for personal use — never redistribute them. The theme works fully without this folder.

autoCastFromCombat.name: Auto-fill cast from combat
autoCastFromCombat.hint: When the combat stage opens (and when combatants join mid-fight), automatically add them to the VN cast: player-owned and friendly tokens on the left, enemies on the right. Add-only — it never removes members you placed manually. Hidden combatants stay out until revealed.

bgFolderPath.name: Background images folder
bgFolderPath.hint: Default folder opened when picking a background image.

portraitFolderPath.name: Portrait images folder
portraitFolderPath.hint: Default folder opened when picking portrait images.

worldOffsetY.name: Global portrait Y offset (px)
worldOffsetY.hint: Shifts every portrait up or down globally.

zIndex.name: UI z-index
zIndex.hint: Raise if other UI elements overlap the VN window.

aiImageFolder.name: AI images folder
aiImageFolder.hint: Folder where AI-generated images are saved, relative to Foundry's Data storage.

license.releaseConfirmThis: This will deactivate VND Enhanced on THIS device until you reconnect Patreon. Continue?
license.releaseConfirmOther: This frees the slot used by another device (it will stop working there). Continue?
license.hint: Each Patreon account can activate the module on up to 2 devices. Release a slot here if you switched browser or computer.
license.connectHint: Connect your Patreon account to enable premium features.
license.codeHint: Paste the code shown after connecting your Patreon account.
license.connected: VND Enhanced: Connected as {tier} subscriber. Welcome!
license.releaseFailed: VND Enhanced: Failed to release slot — {message}
license.reconnected: VND Enhanced: License server reconnected. Premium features restored.
license.suspended: VND Enhanced: License server unreachable. Premium features suspended until reconnected.

ui.editModeOff: Edit mode: reorder, scale and remove portraits
ui.castPresets: Cast Presets — save and load casts
ui.stageEmptyHint: Drag actors from the side panels

combat.timerAutoOn: Auto-reset ON — restarts the timer each turn (click to disable)
combat.timerAutoOff: Auto-reset OFF — the timer does not restart on its own (click to enable)

scenes.title: Scenes
scenes.importEmpty: VNE: No scenes found in the file.

reactions.title: Reactions: {name}
reactions.hint: Each row = one expression. Actor owners can switch it during the session.
reactions.autoHpHint: name a reaction hurt/wounded (≤50%) or critical/ko (≤25%) for automatic activation.
reactions.selectToDelete: VNE: Select a template to delete.
reactions.applied: VNE: Template "{name}" applied. Click Save to confirm.
reactions.enterName: VNE: Enter a name for the template.
reactions.nothingToSave: VNE: No reactions with images to save.

presets.title: Cast Presets
presets.hint: Presets save the full cast (left + right + portraits + reactions) and let you restore it in one click.
presets.selectToDelete: VNE: Select a preset to delete.
presets.enterName: VNE: Enter a name for the preset.
presets.castEmpty: VNE: The cast is empty, nothing to save.

status.title: Status Effects — {name}
status.none: VNE | No status effects found for this system.
status.toggleFailed: VNE | Could not toggle status effect.
status.noActorForCombatant: VNE | Could not find actor for this combatant.

notify.vnClosed: The GM hasn't opened the VN stage yet.
notify.hiddenByGM: The GM has hidden the VN stage from you.
notify.vnInactive: VN Dialogues Enhanced is not active in this world yet.
notify.stageFull: VNE: Stage is full (max 5 per row).
notify.noTokenForActor: VNE: No token found on this scene for that actor.
notify.encounterFailed: VNE: Could not create combat encounter.
notify.combatStageFailed: VNE: Could not activate Combat Stage — encounter creation failed.
notify.noCastTokens: Combat Stage is active, but no VN cast tokens were found on this scene.
notify.notInTracker: Actor is not in the combat tracker.

help.title: VND Enhanced — How to Use
help.target1: Click any NPC portrait on the right panel.
help.target2: In the menu that appears, click "Select as target".
help.target3: The portrait glows red — the enemy is now targeted.
help.target4: Click the same portrait again → "Select as target" to deselect.
help.attack2: Open your character sheet and roll your attack (Strike, spell, etc.).
help.attack3: The attack roll chat card appears — PF2e auto-checks vs. the target's AC.
help.attack4: Click "Apply Damage" on the chat card to deal damage to the targeted token.
help.damage1: The GM targets your character (your portrait may glow red).
help.damage2: The GM rolls the enemy's attack against your AC.
help.damage3: If it hits, the GM clicks "Apply Damage" — your HP bar updates automatically.
help.menuIntro: Click any portrait in combat mode to open the quick menu:
help.menuTarget: Select as Target — set as combat target
help.menuSpeaker: Set as Speaker — show in center stage
help.add1: Drag an actor from the Actors sidebar onto the Players (left) or NPCs (right) panel.
help.add2: Or click the + button at the top of each panel (GM only).
help.speaker1: Single-click a portrait to make it the active speaker (large center portrait).
help.speaker2: Click again to remove them from the spotlight.
help.speaker3: Players can only activate their own characters.
help.options1: Double-click — open options: remove, open sheet, set speaker.
help.options2: Right-click — open portrait editor (scale, offset, reactions) — GM only.
help.scenes1: Click Scenes in the bottom bar to manage locations.
help.scenes2: Save the current background + cast as a named scene for quick recall.
help.gmTop1: Combat Stage — enter/exit combat display mode; shows HP bars and turn order.
help.gmTop2: Edit Mode — drag portraits to reorder, right-click to scale/offset individual portraits.
help.gmTop3: AI Generator — generate portrait images with AI.
help.gmTop4: Cast Presets — save and reload full actor lineups instantly.
help.allTop3: Hide UI — collapse all VN panels (background only view).
help.allTop4: Close — GM closes VN for everyone; players hide it locally.
help.visibility1: The Players panel (top-right) lets you show/hide the VN window per player.
help.visibility2: Click the eye icon next to a player's name to toggle their view.
help.visibility3: Click "Show All" to restore everyone at once.
help.timer1: Set the minutes field next to the timer icon, then click the hourglass to start.
help.timer2: Click the sync icon to auto-reset the timer every turn.
help.timer3: The timer turns red when under 30 seconds.
